calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Zadik Shapiro, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Linda Grigsby, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Arnold Walter Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Regina Brown is present.
Ruth Hawley representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 785 Brannan Street, #312 San Francisco California.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
